title: turnera weddelliana var. normalis
intro: Turnera weddelliana var. normalis, also known as Turnera weddelliana, is a species of flowering plant in the family Passifloraceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Turnera weddelliana var. normalis include relief from pain, fever, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
